privileged_info_summary: The Student of the Month certificate template task requires creating a single-page ActivInspire flipchart file saved as 'student_certificate.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. The template must contain the title 'Student of the Month', three form fields labeled 'Awarded to', 'Date', and 'Signed', a border rectangle for framing, and at least 2 decorative Star or Circle shapes. Flipchart files are Promethean ActivInspire presentations with .flipchart extension (alternative .flp). The verification system extracts and analyzes the file as a ZIP archive containing XML to count text elements and shapes, checking for at least 1 border rectangle, 3 writing lines, and 2+ decorative shapes.
